lines.text: 16 October 1950-1455 to 1530 hours. Objects seen by troopers Isabell, Briggs
16 October 1950-1520 hours. Radar scopes at McGhee-Tyson Airport giving
16 October 1950 - 1956 to 2004 hours. MEPA Guards, Brown, Herron, and Davis Report
Attached to the original only are two Knoxville OSI reports concerning SUBJECT.
CORRECTION on second page of the S/I, Subject as above, dated 13 October 1950,
replace the word Oliver Springs for "Sulphur Springs".
SOURCE: Major R. C. Care, Capt. W. Akin, Lt. Clevenger, (Knoxville Radar Site);
Lt. Wolf (Pilot of fighter aircraft); Eastern Air Defense Command Representative;
